polly_note: DATA-ONLY REFRESH (Tuesday 2026-07-21). No pause/promote verdicts today — decision review: Mondays. EN A/B back to dead even after the weekend: by page A 0.95% (15 txn / 1580 sess) vs B 0.91% (15 txn / 1654 sess); by ad-content lp_a 1.05% (17 txn) vs lp_b 1.02% (17 txn). Last week's mid-week A 'lead' fully evaporated — no winner, as expected. OBSERVATION (not a verdict): localized IT/DE/FR LP sessions collapsed this week (IT ~29 total vs ~600 prior week, DE 7, FR 2) — paid spend on the localized campaigns was clearly pulled back; check with Lucas/whoever owns Meta budget whether intentional. Shopify 90d stable & growing: US/UK/IT top 3 unchanged (IT 147 orders / €10,592). SHIPPED since last refresh: BGG rating 7.2 update + NordicCaptain->Fitty_City (8.2) review swap, both live & verified on all pages.
